kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Edmund's levy is lower than both the Tanner and the artisan who makes Barrels.
Either Needle goes with 11 coins or someone in the River Ward goes with 11 coins.
Between Blacksmith and 11 coins, one goes with Matilda and the other with Saddles.
Loom goes with at most one of Beatrix, Blacksmith, Boots, Riverside, and 11 coins.
Needle goes with exactly two of Edmund, Blacksmith, and Boots.
Either Awl goes with Matilda or someone in the Clothiers' Guild goes with Matilda (but not both).
Barrels does not go with Bridgegate.
Saddles goes with at least four of Godfrey, Blacksmith, Awl, Riverside, and 12 coins.
Everyone in the Clothiers' Guild ranks higher in levy than everyone in the Joiners' Guild.
The artisan who makes Barrels and the artisan who makes Saddles are in the same guild.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: Esther's weight is lower than both the angler who landed the Trout and the angler fishing with Corn.
Either Swimbait goes with 13 lb or someone in the East Watershed goes with 13 lb.
Between Bass and 13 lb, one goes with Wade and the other with Shrimp.
Spoon goes with at most one of Boone, Bass, Dough, Pinehollow, and 13 lb.
Swimbait goes with exactly two of Esther, Bass, and Dough.
